title: schizachyrium plumigerum
intro: Schizachyrium plumigerum, also known as Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Schizachyrium plumigerum include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by drying and processing the leaves and roots of the plant.
